cases.prompt: Commercial retail or service parcels in Burlington.

failures.message: R2SearchError: Column building_value is not listed for alias ps on derived/parcel_search.parquet. Do not select generic building_value or year_built from parcel_search. Use assessor_building_value, primary_building_improvement_value, total_improvement_value, primary_actual_year_built, oldest_actual_year_built, or primary_effective_year_built when those fields are needed.

action_plan: Fix the SQL-generation guardrail or schema contract named in the failure before rerunning the eval.
